full_text:
Yan Bao (Wentong)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Bao, styledWentong, was born in Zuopingyi. One of the few officers of Zhong Yao’s staff considered to be of real quality, impressed Cao Pi with his literary skills. Yan Bao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Yan Bao lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
